scripts.dev: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground dev
scripts.eval: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground eval
scripts.build: nub run --filter genui build && nub run --filter @genui/check build
scripts.test: nub run build && nub run --recursive test
scripts.check: nub run build && nub run format:check && nub run --recursive check && nub run test:pack
scripts.test:reliability: nub run build && nub run --filter @genui/playground test:reliability
scripts.typecheck: nub run build && nub run --recursive typecheck
scripts.format: oxfmt *.json .*.json scripts packages/check/*.json packages/check/src packages/genui/*.json packages/genui/src examples/playground/*.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check *.json .*.json scripts packages/check/*.json packages/check/src packages/genui/*.json packages/genui/src examples/playground/*.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
